form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after 10 months 7th of 11 at Chantilly All Weather on March 23 over 1600m, 6 len behind Showpower carrying 56kg at $19. form.formComment: Resumes after a break of three months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation 13th of 16 at Chantilly All Weather January 10 over 1600m, 8 len behind Duty carrying 60kg at $64. First up last campaign third of 11 at Compiegne September 16 over 2000m, soft track; 3 len behind Millar carrying 56.5kg at $46. Looks a key runner.
